3225810.name: FORBIDDEN FORMULA
3225810.description:
FORBIDDEN FORMULA is an exciting 2D platformer with quest elements that will throw you into the heart of chaos. As a result of infiltration into a secret laboratory, a virus was released that turns people into monstrous creatures. You are left alone to confront hundreds of infected and try to find a way to stop the spread of this terrible disease.

You have to explore an abandoned laboratory, solve puzzles and collect information to prevent a catastrophe.

You will find:

- A fascinating plot with unexpected twists.
- Exciting battles with the infected, requiring agility and tactics.
- Beautiful pixel graphics and atmospheric soundtrack.
- Challenging puzzles that will test your ingenuity and intuition.

You are the last hope of humanity!
